title: lobelia × hybrida
intro: Lobelia × hybrida, also known as Lobelia or Indian tobacco, is a hybrid flowering plant that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and act as a natural expectorant. The health benefits of Lobelia × hybrida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. Lobelia × hybrida can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
